fonts.heading: Cabinet Grotesk
rules: NO Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato, or Syne.
Headings (H1, H2) MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
H1 Maximum size: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl. DO NOT exceed.
Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome.
Use pure black/white for maximum contrast data display.
Never use pure #000000; the zinc scale adds a slight tint that feels clinical.

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Sharp or max 8px (rounded-none or rounded-md). No pill-shaped buttons.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12, Tight Gap (gap-4 or gap-6). Use bento-style spans.
rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.

dashboard_cards.classes: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md shadow-sm overflow-hidden

developer_json_view.classes: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md font-mono text-xs overflow-auto p-4 text-zinc-400

headers_and_nav.style: Solid Background with hard bottom border.
headers_and_nav.classes: bg-zinc-950 border-b border-zinc-800 z-50 sticky top-0

upload_zone.description: A prominent dashed-border zone with an upload icon.
upload_zone.classes: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-800 rounded-md p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors hover:bg-zinc-900/50

image_preview.description: Displays the uploaded X-ray. It MUST maintain aspect ratio. A simulated 'scanning line' animation should overlay the image when the Roboflow prediction is fetching.
image_preview.container_classes: relative w-full rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-center

confidence_bar.description: A horizontal progress bar to display the AI confidence score.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-200 h-10 px-4 rounded-md font-medium tracking-tight inline-flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-800 h-10 px-4 rounded-md font-medium tracking-tight inline-flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

interactions_and_motion.scanning_animation: Animate a highly visible cyan/white line moving top to bottom over the image preview during analysis.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: ALL interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white). Focus states must have higher contrast.
interactions_and_motion.staggered_lists: History table items should fade in and slide up slightly on load.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all interface icons. Key icons: UploadCloud, Scan, Activity, History, Download, Code, CheckCircle, XCircle.

images.description: Dental X-ray image for testing or empty states.
Abstract dark medical background. Use subtly if needed for landing page or auth screens.

roboflow_integration.rule: Keep modular. Create a service file. Ensure 'ROBOFLOW_API_KEY' and 'ROBOFLOW_MODEL_ID' are expected from .env. Show exact place for config.
roboflow_integration.logic: If predictions array empty -> show 'No implant detected' with negative status color. If implant_present in predictions -> show 'Implant detected' with positive status color. Display confidence % clearly.

pdf_export.rule: Use window.print() triggered by an action button, and use a specialized print stylesheet (@media print) to hide nav/sidebar and strictly print the image + result + confidence + timestamp in a clean layout.

history.rule: Store upload timestamp, prediction outcome, and confidence in the backend database. Allow viewing past records in a dense, tabular format using 'Control Room' grid styling.

developer_view.rule: The raw JSON response from Roboflow must be viewable in a collapsible or dedicated 'Developer Mode' container styled like a dark terminal.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='upload-input', data-testid='analyze-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this full JSON file before starting.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts or an open-source font provider.
Implement the 'Control Room' dense grid architecture for the dashboard view.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to everything interactive.
Ensure the layout strictly uses Tailwind CSS and follows the precise zinc-scale monochrome palette outlined above, avoiding generic blue/purple saas defaults.
